/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/harness_dlrm_v2/main_dlrm_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/harness_dlrm_v2/dlrm_v2_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/harness_dlrm_v2/batch_maker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/harness_dlrm_v2/dlrm_v2_kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/harness_dlrm_v2.dir/common/logger.cpp.o -o /work/build/bin/harness_dlrm_v2  -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lgflags -lglog /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /work/build/inference/loadgen/build/libmlperf_loadgen.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so -lnuma -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
